creator: hjh@best.com
text:
A patch to update lwm (category x11) from 0.04 to 0.05

How-To-Repeat: --- /usr/ports/x11/lwm/Makefile.orig    Tue May 26 22:23:53 1998
+++ /usr/ports/x11/lwm/Makefile Tue May 26 22:24:24 1998
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:   lwm
-# Version required:    0.04
+# Version required:    0.05
 # Date created:                17 March 1998
 # Whom:                        J Han <hjh@best.com>
 #
@@ -7,7 +7,7 @@
 #

 DISTNAME=      lwm
-PKGNAME=       lwm-0.04
+PKGNAME=       lwm-0.05
 CATEGORIES=    x11
 MASTER_SITES=  http://users.ch.genedata.com/~enh/
 EXTRACT_SUFX=  .tar.Z
